data.content:
Stale grooming handoff

Beat was groomed because it was stale.
Decision: drop
Rationale: Every acceptance criterion is already shipped. `src/lib/stale-beat-grooming.ts` provides the injected-clock age helper; `src/components/stale-beat-grooming-dialog.tsx` + `-trigger.tsx` + `-list.tsx` cover the count badge, beat list, and beat-detail opening; empty/loading states are handled inside the dialog. The implementation chose a toolbar trigger + modal dialog over a persistent right-side rail, but that is a resolved design decision, not a gap. Twelve library files and the full job-running pipeline exist. There is nothing left to build.
Agent: claude-claude-sonnet-4-6
Job: stale-grooming-1
Repo: /home/cartine/foolery
Action: marked abandoned.
